mapper.sql: id, novel_id, chapter_no, title, summary, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM novel_chapter_timeline WHERE novel_id = #{novelId} ORDER BY chapter_no ASC
SELECT FROM novel_chapter_timeline WHERE novel_id = #{novelId} AND ( title ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{titleKeyword}, '%') OR summary ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{summaryKeyword}, '%') ) ORDER BY chapter_no ASC
